name: PeerClick
description: AI-powered ad tracker with real-time reporting, anti-fraud kit and mobile attribution for affiliates.

seo.title: PeerClick — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: PeerClick: AI-powered ad tracker with real-time reporting, anti-fraud kit and mobile attribution for affiliates.

when_to_use: Tracking affiliate campaign performance with real-time reporting
Detecting fraud in mobile install campaigns via anti-fraud kit
Attributing app installs across affiliate and paid channels

pros: AI-assisted tracking with anti-fraud kit bundled
Handles high event volumes at affordable pricing
Self-serve onboarding works for small teams
cons: Stronger in affiliate world than mobile MMP
Partner ecosystem thinner than Tier-1 MMPs
review.verdict: Solid affiliate-first ad tracker with fraud and mobile hooks, but not the right tool for enterprise app UA.
review.best_for: Affiliate marketers and small performance shops needing cheap, fast tracking with fraud filters.
review.not_for: Enterprise app brands that need a full MMP and deep SKAN support.
